gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (58/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (58/ 9)
text: مَا زَارَ مُسْلِمٌ أَخَاهُ الْمُسْلِمَ فِي اللَّهِ وَ لِلَّهِ إِلَّا نَادَاهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَيُّهَا الزَّائِرُ طِبْتَ وَ طَابَتْ لَكَ الْجَنَّةُ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Is’haq, from Bakr Bin Muhammad,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘No Muslim would visit his Muslim brother regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and for the Sake of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, except that Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic would Call out to him: “O you visitor! You have done well, and the Paradise is (Made to be) better for you”’.
en.sarwar: 10. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from [Ahmad ibn Muhammad] from Ahmad ibn Ishaq from Bakr ibn Muhammad from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whenever a Muslim visits his Muslim brother, due to Allah’s relation, and for the sake of Allah, Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, will say, ‘O visitor, how beautiful is your deed! How beautiful is paradise as your reward! ’”
